changelog:
0.4.3 Settings interface overhauled—redundant navigation eliminated, interaction paths now intuitive. Extension component layouts standardized—boundary conditions resolved, consistent visuals across form factors. Field descriptions standardized—technical terminology and status prompts corrected, ambiguity removed.

Sendspin deep optimization: information cards upgraded with multi-dimensional panels, full reveal via upward swipe. Coordinate system offset fixed—cumulative calculation errors resolved, anchor point precision improved. Protocol layer corrected—handshake state machine anomalies addressed, edge-case connection stability enhanced.

Mod Store stability enhanced: crash scenarios fixed with comprehensive exception tolerance. Resource loading optimized—asynchronous queue reconstructed, race conditions prevented. Allwinner A64 SoC support modularized—drivers migrated to Mod Store for on-demand loading and independent updates.

Service restart announcement fixed—broadcast logic corrected, duplicate triggers eliminated. Auto-startup filtering enhanced—abnormal volume amplification detected and suppressed, preventing boot pulse audio anomalies. Protocol stack errata corrected—serialization rules fixed for cross-version compatibility. Memory management optimized—handle leakage resolved, long-running stability improved.
